title: Multi-Change Option
excerpt: Currently when you copy a workflow, the board remains the same. It would be helpful to have the ability to select multiple steps (or the whole flow) to change the board that is being interacted with. Our team builds work…

posts.author: KristaBowman (Krista Bowman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently when you copy a workflow, the board remains the same. It would be helpful to have the ability to select multiple steps (or the whole flow) to change the board that is being interacted with. Our team builds workflows with hundreds of check s and changing these one by one is time consuming.

Also, there is lag in the workflow create tool when you hit around 150 checks, and gets notably worse around the 200 mark.
